title: BUILDERS_BRIEF_V1
description: Root execution contract for one ORACLE SUPER 2: BUILDERS run. Not prompt text — a typed execution contract.

brief_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this brief. Required for deterministic run identity.

audience.description: Intended reader or consumer of the artifact.

must_include.description: Topics or elements that must appear in the artifact.

must_avoid.description: Topics, terms, or framings to exclude.

style.description: Tone or style guidance (e.g., 'concise and technical', 'accessible overview').

max_length.description: Maximum word count or character count for final artifact.

allowed_sources.description: Source IDs or domains permitted as references.

max_phases.description: Maximum number of pipeline phases to run. Standard is 5.

max_claims.description: Maximum total claims permitted across all phases.

max_runtime_seconds.description: Wall-clock timeout in seconds. Non-constitutive for determinism.

input_refs.description: References to source documents, prior artifacts, or evidence bundles to be used.

seed.description: Explicit seed for deterministic execution. Required if cross-run reproducibility is expected.

x-law: No free-text hidden instructions outside this object. brief_id must be globally unique. seed must be explicit if determinism is expected.
